architecture.summary: 3-phase resolver in sync-target-resolver.ts (Phase 0: umbrella match, Phase 1: name/ID match, Phase 2: prefix routing, Phase 3: global fallback). template-creator.ts creates metadata.json without project field. story-router.ts extracts prefix from US-{PREFIX}-NNN IDs.

integrations.summary: GitHub per-repo sync, JIRA (SWE2E for all), ADO (SpecWeaveSync for all). sync-setup wizard in issue-tracker/index.ts. sync-config-writer propagates to childRepos.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI internals only, no UI changes

performance.summary: N/A - config/routing logic changes only, no performance impact

security.summary: N/A - internal routing logic, no auth/permissions changes

edge-cases.summary: Backward compat for old US-NNN stories via Phase 3 fallback. Rate-limited GitHub API handling in wizard. Missing project field graceful degradation. Disabled child repos skipped.
